text_query: complete home office technology setup for a remote graphic designer
reasonings: A capable desktop PC with dedicated graphics-friendly Ryzen 7 and 16GB RAM suitable for graphic design remote work.
A budget desktop with only 4GB RAM is underpowered for graphic design work, making it a lesser alternative.
A basic 720p TV is not suited for professional graphic design monitor needs.
A basic LCD writing tablet for notes, not a true graphics tablet for professional design work.
A 4K IPS monitor is ideal for a graphic designer's home office display needs.
A webcam is a standard component of a complete remote work office setup for video calls.
A simple doodle board for kids/notes does not serve professional graphic design needs.
A wireless graphics tablet with pressure sensitivity directly supports digital design work.
A standalone Android drawing tablet can be used for sketching but lacks professional design software compatibility of a PC-tethered tablet.
A pen display monitor is a core tool for professional graphic design work.
